panels.title: Kafka Intake Health
panels.description: API can reach Kafka bootstrap for event append.

panels.title: PostgreSQL Primary
panels.description: Writable primary reachability through Pgpool.

panels.title: Worker Health
panels.description: Worker consumer loop health.

panels.title: PostgreSQL Standbys
panels.description: Local HA target is two standbys.

panels.title: API Request Rate
panels.description: API request rate by HTTP status.

panels.title: API 5xx Ratio
panels.description: User-visible server error ratio.

panels.title: API Latency
panels.description: API response latency. Worker persistence is measured separately.

panels.title: API Stage Latency
panels.description: Hot-path stage latency such as membership, idempotency, and Kafka publish.

panels.title: Worker Throughput By Result
panels.description: Worker event processing rate by result.

panels.title: Worker Failure Ratio
panels.description: Worker processing failure ratio.

panels.title: Accepted To Persisted Lag
panels.description: End-to-end async lag from API accepted to PostgreSQL persisted.

panels.title: Kafka Topic Wait Time
panels.description: Application-side proxy for Kafka backlog before worker processing.

panels.title: Worker Stage Latency
panels.description: Worker stage bottlenecks such as db_persist and status update.

panels.title: Worker Last Success Age
panels.description: Seconds since last successful worker job.

panels.title: DB Pool In Use
panels.description: Checked-out DB connections by process.

panels.title: DB Failure Reasons (15m)
panels.description: DB failures grouped by reason over 15 minutes.

panels.title: DLQ Events And Replay
panels.description: DLQ inflow and replay guard outcomes.

panels.title: PostgreSQL Replication Delay
panels.description: Maximum standby replication delay in bytes.

panels.title: PostgreSQL Replication Capacity
panels.description: Primary reachability and standby capacity.

panels.title: PostgreSQL Replication States
panels.description: Replication state and sync state distribution.

panels.title: Worker Scaling
panels.description: KEDA desired worker replicas versus available replicas.

panels.title: API Scaling
panels.description: API HPA desired replicas versus available replicas.

panels.title: Pod Restarts (15m)
panels.description: Restart signal for CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, and resource pressure.

panels.title: Unavailable Replicas
panels.description: Unavailable deployment replicas from rollout, scheduling, or readiness issues.

options.content:
### DLQ operator links

- DLQ summary API: `GET /v1/dlq/ingress/summary?limit=200&sample_limit=5`
- Recent DLQ samples: `GET /v1/dlq/ingress?limit=20`
- Runbook: `docs/RUNBOOK.md#dlq-summary-triage`

Use the summary API after `DLQ Events And Replay` changes to split failures by `by_reason`, `replayable`, `blocked`, `oldest_age_seconds`, and `by_stream`.
